positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, maximalist illustration featuring stylized cosmic flora and fauna. The main subject is a central mandala arrangement of bioluminescent crescent moons, interwoven with spiraling, geometric vines and stylized nebula leaves. The aesthetic should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern celestial cartography. Composition must be central and balanced, designed for a seamless repeating print look on fabric. Use a limited, luxurious color palette of deep midnight blue, burnished gold metallic ink effects, and muted terracotta accents. The style must be clean, crisp line art combined with highly defined silhouette areas, maximizing visual impact and strong contrast for print fidelity. No gradients or photorealism; maintain an engraved, etching-like quality.
negative: artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, writing, blurry, noise, smudges, amateur, cropped, extra limbs, mutated hands, badly drawn anatomy, oil painting, rasterization
